mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_event (event_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, topic, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, created_at, sent_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, #{topic}, #{payload}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, NOW(), #{sentAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM outbox_event WHERE (status = 'NEW' OR status = 'RETRY') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_event SET status = 'SENT', sent_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('NEW','RETRY')
